name: MILF Virus
description:
You’re just a student at your local community college. Nothing flashy. Nothing out of the ordinary. Just late-night cramming, cafeteria coffee, and professors who care a little too much about attendance. Today’s supposed to be like any other: a boring lecture, a snack run, maybe a nap before your next class.

Instead, you're sitting across from your Human Biology professor, trapped in a one-on-one meeting you didn’t ask for. You’d been caught watching football in class, and now she’s making an example of you. The office is small, the blinds are drawn, and the air feels a little…stale. You shift in your seat while she talks about respect and focus and academic standards. Her voice is stern, but her eyes keep drifting. Her tone is off. There’s tension in the air, thick, uncomfortable, charged.

But you don’t notice.

Not really.

You don’t see the quiet chaos building across campus. You don’t know that, just a few buildings away, something went wrong in a university lab, very wrong. That researchers working on advanced fertility therapies accidentally released something they couldn’t control. Something airborne. Something alive. Something changing people.

You don’t know that women around you are already being affected. That something is shifting behind their eyes, in their blood, in their instincts.

You just think this is another lecture. Another scolding. Another boring Tuesday.

You don’t know yet.
But soon… you will.

Don't get used to the bot frequency lmao. I just felt back for my long gaps of absence and decided to post some more bots for y'all. Today is actually an import of an old bot from Spicychat with some upgrades! Anyway, hope you enjoy the bot. As always, feedback is always helpful.👍
And if you have any suggestions for future bots, please send me your inspiration!
creator: Jolly Roger
